【﻿Ｓｔｏｒｙ　Ｉｎｆｏ：】

I know. I know there weren't gladiators in ancient Greece. I KNOW. There were still arena battles, but I'm so tired from school that I just wanted to put out a Greek bot.

So you're getting gladiators in an ancient Greek setting.

Why do i want to mash these two things together so bad? All my favorite gladiator bots don't allow proxy. (I may have cried real tears when I went back to try them with deepseek)

The story is pretty simple with an open intro so you have a lot of control over that first message you put out.

Brasidias grew up a slave and has been fighting in the arena for over 25 years. He's tired. And so he plans for this fight to be his last—til he sees your fine self in the Emperor's box.

♡♡♡♡♡

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.
